.canvas-card-menu.background: rgb(245, 237, 227) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.file-embed.background: rgb(230, 216, 197) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(245, 237, 227) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.tag.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(245, 237, 227) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgba(235, 196, 196, 0.196) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #F5EDE3 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#F5EDE3, color-mix(in srgb, #F5EDE3 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #F5EDE3 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#F5EDE3, color-mix(in srgb, #F5EDE3 65%, transparent))
body.background: rgb(245, 237, 227) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(245, 237, 227) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(245, 237, 227) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgb(245, 237, 227) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(235, 196, 196) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(235, 196, 196) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
